additional_rules.description: GMCC Radiant — No-ratio, no-employment AU program. No income or DTI required. Available in CA, HI, IL, NJ, NY, NV (all counties). Broker channel only.
additional_rules.income_docs: None required. No employment info on 1003. No DTI calculation.
additional_rules.asset_docs: 1 month bank statement or VOD (may be provided before CTC).
additional_rules.gift_funds: Allowed on all purchases, max 50% of down payment. Not allowed for reserves.
additional_rules.business_funds: May be used for down payment, closing costs, and reserves if 100% ownership with CPA letter.
additional_rules.no_credit_history: Permanent residents with no FICO/no credit history eligible. Foreign nationals without SSN/ITIN also eligible.
additional_rules.min_fico_note: Min FICO 680 if borrower has SSN/ITIN. No FICO exception for permanent residents and foreign nationals.
additional_rules.credit_standards: Max 1x30 mortgage/rent late in past 24 months. 2 tradelines seasoned 12 months required. SS&DIL/Foreclosure not allowed. BK: 2yrs; Loan modification: 7yrs.
additional_rules.reserves_all_others: Up to $2M: 12 months P&I (CD). $2M-$3.5M: 24 months P&I (CD).
additional_rules.reserves_no_credit_or_cashout: 24 months P&I (CD) for all loan amounts up to $3.5M.
additional_rules.rate_buydown: 0.125% rate reduction or 0.5% fee reduction available with additional 6 months reserve.
additional_rules.appraisal: 1 appraisal for loans ≤$1M. 1 appraisal + desk review for $1M-$3.5M.
additional_rules.condo: Warrantable condos eligible. Non-warrantable case by case. High-rise condo (over 8 floors) in super-lien states not eligible.
additional_rules.restrictions: ACH required for payments. Property cannot be listed for sale at application (R/T or cash-out). No non-arm's length / FSBO. No PPP for investment.

general_notes: GMCC Radiant — No-ratio, no-employment AU program. No income or employment information needed on 1003. No DTI.
Available in CA, HI, IL, NJ, NY, NV — all counties. Broker channel only.
Purchase, rate/term refi, and cash-out refi. Primary, investment, and second home.
1 month bank statement or VOD required (may be provided before CTC, not at submission).
Min FICO 680. No FICO exception for permanent residents with no credit history and foreign nationals.
Max loan amount $3,500,000. LTV tiers based on occupancy, loan amount, and credit history.
Primary owner-occupied up to $1.5M: 65% purchase/R&T LTV, 60% cash-out LTV.
Investment up to $1.5M: 60% purchase/R&T LTV, 50% cash-out LTV.
No FICO/No credit: up to $1.5M 60% purchase/R&T LTV (lower than standard).
Reserve requirement: 12 months P&I (up to $2M) or 24 months P&I ($2M-$3.5M). No FICO and cash-out always require 24 months.
Reserves held as CD at GMCC investor; waiver option by depositing reserves in US financial institution.
Gift funds allowed on all purchases (max 50% of down payment). Not allowed for reserves.
Non-warrantable condo eligible case by case. High-rise in super-lien states not eligible.
ACH payment required. No PPP for investment.
